prompt: A white Toyota HiLux ute with a sophisticated partial vehicle wrap featuring an elegant intertwined L and K monogram with flowing calligraphic connections. The monogram is rendered in gold (#C9A96E) on the front doors, large and prominent, with the letters interleaved and overlapping like a luxury fashion house emblem. Below the monogram on the door, DESIGN AND BUILD appears in refined small caps in charcoal (#2C2C2C). The rear quarter panel shows contact details: 0401 061 246 and lkdesignandbuild.com.au in charcoal text. A thin gold pinstripe runs along the body line. The wrap uses a charcoal, white, and gold color scheme, clean and premium. The ute is parked on an Adelaide suburban street with eucalyptus trees and neat houses in the background. Bright daylight, professional vehicle photography.
negative_prompt: full wrap, busy graphics, neon colors, cheap vinyl, bubbles in wrap, dirty vehicle, ugly background, industrial area, nighttime, cartoon, illustration, low quality

settings.depth_of_field: medium, vehicle sharp, background slightly soft
